---
title: "Georef vs Nominal - Strata Comparison Report"
output: html_document
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = FALSE)
library(dplyr)
library(flextable)
library(htmltools)
```

# Summary

```{r, results='asis'}
make_summary_report <- function(res_tests) {
  do.call(rbind, lapply(res_tests, function(x) {
    test_name <- paste(x$dims, collapse = " + ")
    if (!is.null(x$error)) {
      return(data.frame(
        test = test_name,
        n_only_georef = NA,
        n_only_nominal = NA,
        diff = NA,
        status = "ERROR"
      ))
    }
    n_geo <- nrow(x$only_georef)
    n_nom <- nrow(x$only_nominal)
    data.frame(
      test = test_name,
      n_only_georef = n_geo,
      n_only_nominal = n_nom,
      diff = n_geo - n_nom,
      status = ifelse(n_geo == 0 & n_nom == 0, "OK", "MISMATCH")
    )
  }))
}

ft_html <- function(x) {
  flextable::htmltools_value(flextable::flextable(x))
}

print_one_test_report <- function(x) {
  if (!is.null(x$error)) {
    return(
      htmltools::tagList(
        htmltools::tags$h3("Error"),
        ft_html(data.frame(error = x$error))
      )
    )
  }
  
  htmltools::tagList(
    htmltools::tags$h3("Counts"),
    ft_html(data.frame(
      metric = c("Only in georef", "Only in nominal"),
      value = c(nrow(x$only_georef), nrow(x$only_nominal))
    )),
    
    htmltools::tags$h3("Summary by source_authority - only in georef"),
    ft_html(x$summary_only_georef),
    
    htmltools::tags$h3("Summary by source_authority - only in nominal"),
    ft_html(x$summary_only_nominal),
    
    htmltools::tags$h3("Detailed rows - only in georef"),
    ft_html(x$only_georef),
    
    htmltools::tags$h3("Detailed rows - only in nominal"),
    ft_html(x$only_nominal)
  )
}

report <- make_summary_report(res_tests)
report <- report[order(-abs(report$diff)), ]
htmltools::browsable(
  htmltools::tagList(
    htmltools::tags$h3("Global summary"),
    ft_html(report)
  )
)
```

# Detailed results

## Source_authority + fishing_fleet

```{r}
htmltools::browsable(print_one_test_report(res_tests[['source_authority + fishing_fleet']]))
```

## Source_authority + gear_type

```{r}
htmltools::browsable(print_one_test_report(res_tests[['source_authority + gear_type']]))
```

## Source_authority + species

```{r}
htmltools::browsable(print_one_test_report(res_tests[['source_authority + species']]))
```

## Source_authority + geographic_identifier_nom

```{r}
htmltools::browsable(print_one_test_report(res_tests[['source_authority + geographic_identifier_nom']]))
```

## Source_authority + year

```{r}
htmltools::browsable(print_one_test_report(res_tests[['source_authority + year']]))
```

## Source_authority + fishing_mode

```{r}
htmltools::browsable(print_one_test_report(res_tests[['source_authority + fishing_mode']]))
```

## Source_authority + group_species_iattc_sharks

```{r}
htmltools::browsable(print_one_test_report(res_tests[['source_authority + group_species_iattc_sharks']]))
```
